response.justification: Strong fullstack engineer with 15+ years of experience, well above the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which matches the AI agent development requirement. Solid background across the primary stack (TypeScript, Node, React), databases (MongoDB), cloud (AWS CDK), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), with demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes across multiple recent roles
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role aligns with the AI agent requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, plus teaching/workshops showing communication skills
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; testing background leans toward Selenium and custom D-lang frameworks
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is from older roles (robotic arms, mobile orchestration)
Heavy investment in DLang across many projects may signal a preference that doesn't align with the primary TS/Nest.js stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
